description: The SessionUserController component is used to control a user in a session granted the local user has the proper permissions.

fields._name: The name of the target user.
fields._slider: The slider used to change the volume of the target user.
fields._mute: The button used to mute the target user.
fields._jump: The button used to jump to the target user.
fields._respawn: The button used to respawn the target user.
fields._silence: The button used to silence the target user.
fields._kick: The button used to kick the target user.
fields._ban: The button used to ban the target user.

methods.OnMute: Called when the mute target user button is touched.
methods.OnJump: Called when the jump to target user button is touched.
methods.OnRespawn: Called when the respawn target user button is touched.
methods.OnSilence: Called when the silence target user button is touched.
methods.OnKick: Called when the kick target user button is touched.
methods.OnBan: Called when the ban target user button is touched.

usage: Not to be used directly by the user.
